findings.quote: Bjorkedals orgel skulle bara hela forsamlingens sang, medan Torebys efter ombyggnaden mest tjanade organistens spel.
findings.note: A and B are direct inversions of each other (Bjorkedal<->congregation vs Bjorkedal<->organist) - the classic mirror-pair tell that brackets the key. C ('inte langre spela nagra psalmer over huvud taget') is an absolute overstatement and D ('en och samme byggmastare') is an off-target similarity, not the emphasized musical difference; both are form-eliminable as filler. Blind I can drop C and D (2+ eliminations) and narrow to the A/B pair but cannot decide direction without the passage, so the key is not isolated to one option by form -> PARTIALLY, flag not kill.
